svg.title: Cambridge puzzle 28 — two overlapping paper strips, one folded, 3D isometric view
svg.desc: Isometric diagram showing a flat left strip and a folded right strip overlapping by 5 cm, with total arrangement length 75 cm. The fold has a 3 cm riser height and 3 cm horizontal top.
svg.text: Two identical rectangular pieces of paper are arranged to overlap each other by 5 cm.
One of the rectangles has been folded to make the structure above (not to scale).
The length of the whole arrangement is 75 cm.
What is the length of one of the pieces of paper?
